arts.ttl: Champions League | Juventus v Stuttgart: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Juventus will look to maintain their flawless start to the Champions League campaign as they host Stuttgart at the Allianz Stadium on Tuesday night. The Italian giants have won their first two matches in the competition and sit atop their group with six points. Under new manager Thiago Motta, Juventus have been a model of defensive solidity in Serie A, conceding just one goal in eight league matches. However, their Champions League outings have been more eventful. After a comfortable 3-1 victory over PSV Eindhoven in their opener, Juventus overcame adversity to secure a thrilling 3-2 away win against RB The post Champions League | Juventus v Stuttgart: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.
